give_your_hands_something_else: Give your hands something else to do
when_the_urge_to_pull_arrives_: When the urge to pull arrives, your hands want to move. This gives them a job — one that makes pulling physically impossible.
pick_a_move_practice_it_use_it: Pick a move. Practice it. Use it every time the urge arrives.
pick_the_one_that_feels_most_n: Pick the one that feels most natural. You can change it anytime.
this_is_your_anchor_use_it_eve: This is your anchor. Use it every time the urge arrives.
every_second_you_hold_is_a_sec: Every second you hold is a second the urge is passing.
your_hands_know_what_to_do: Your hands know what to do
you_just_gave_your_hands_somet: You just gave your hands something else to do — and held it. Next time the urge arrives, go straight to your move.
the_faster_you_reach_for_it_th: The faster you reach for it, the easier it gets.
